title: DTS Enabler

manifest.title: DTS Enabler
manifest.appDescription: Restore DTS and Dolby TrueHD/MLP audio on rooted LG webOS 25 TVs, including DTS in mp4/ts/m2ts containers. Decodes native discrete 5.1. Requires the Homebrew Channel + root.

shortDescription: Restore DTS and Dolby TrueHD/MLP audio on rooted LG webOS 25 TVs, including DTS in mp4/ts/m2ts containers. Decodes native discrete 5.1. Requires the Homebrew Channel + root.
